job_summary: An Inspection Readiness Specialist ensures that clinical trials and organizations are fully prepared for regulatory inspections by authorities such as U.S. Food and Drug Administration and European Medicines Agency.
key_responsibilities: Prepare clinical sites and teams for regulatory inspections
Conduct mock audits and gap assessments
qualifications: Experience in QA or regulatory roles
career_path: Inspection Specialist → QA Manager → Compliance Director
skills_required: conduct mock audits and gap assessments
prepare clinical sites and teams for regulatory inspections
